# Result: a0 = 0x100

# 430 # Extension Must Be Active: H

csrr a1, 0x302 # read back medeleg
# Result: a1 = 0x800000

csrr a0, 0x302
# Result: a0 != 0x800000

# Result: a0 != 0xffffffffffffffff

# Result: mcause = 0x8

# 702 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x2
csrs mideleg, a0
csrs mip, a0
csrr a0, sip
# Result: a0 = 0x2

# 703 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80
csrw mideleg, a0
csrw sie, a0
csrr a0, sie
# Result: a0 = 0x80

# 704 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw mideleg, zero
li a1, 2
csrrw a0, sip, a1
csrr a2, sip
# Result: a2 = 0

# 705 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
csrw 0x303, a0
csrr a1, 0x303
li a2, 0x2
csrs mip, a2
li a0, 0x2
csrw 0x304, a0
wfi
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 0x3

# 706 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0
li a1,0x2000000 # address of CLINT msip register
li a2,1
li t0,0x8 # bit 3 set
csrw mideleg,t0 # delegate MSI (though we stay in M-mode)
csrw mie,t0 # enable machine software interrupt
sb a2,0(a1) # set software interrupt pending
wfi
csrr a0,mcause # read cause of interrupt that woke us
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000003

# 707 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80
csrw mie, a0
li a0, 0x80
csrw mip, a0
li a0, 0x80
csrw mideleg, a0
wfi
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 708 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x2000
csrw 0x303, a0
csrr a1, 0x303
# Result: a1 = 0x2000

# Result: a2 = 0

# Result: a0 != 0

csrs mip, 0x2000

csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 0x800000000000000d

# Result: a0 != 0

# 786 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x20000 # set MPRV bit (bit 17)
csrrs x0, mstatus, a0 # write to mstatus
li a0, 0x800 # set MPP to Supervisor (bits 12..11 = 01)
csrrs x0, mstatus, a0 # write to mstatus
csrr a1, mstatus # read back mstatus
andi a1, a1, 0x20000 # isolate MPRV bit
# Result: a1 = 0x20000

# 789 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# Result: a0 = 1

# 792 # Extension Must Be Active: Zicbom

li a0, 0x80000000 # address for CMO
li a1, 0 # size/flags (implementation‑defined)

li a2, 1 # indicate successful execution
# Result: a2 = 0x1

# 831 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1,0
csrw 0x300,a1
li a1,0x3000000000
csrs 0x300,a1
csrr a0,0x300
# Result: a0 = 0x3000000000

# 832 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0xC00000000
or a0, a0, a1
csrw mstatus, a0
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 38
andi a0, a0, 0x3
# Result: a0 = 0x3

# 833 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x3000000000
csrs mstatus, a0
csrr a1, mstatus
and a2, a1, a0
# Result: a2 = 0x3000000000

# 834 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
li a0, 0xC00000000
csrw mstatus, a0
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 34
andi a0, a0, 0x3
# Result: a0 = 0x3

# 835 # Extension Must Be Active: F
li a1, 0b10
slli a1, a1, 32
csrrw a0, 0x300, a1
csrr a0, 0x300
srli a0, a0, 32
andi a0, a0, 0x3
# Result: a0 = 2

# 836 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80000000
csrw mstatus, a0
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 30
# Result: a0 = 2

# 837 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 28
andi a0, a0, 0x3
# Result: a0 = 3

# 838 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t1, 0x00C00000
csrrc t0, mstatus, t1
li t1, 0x00400000
csrrs zero, mstatus, t1
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 22
andi a0, a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 1

# 839 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 20
andi a0, a0, 0x3
# Result: a0 = 0

# 840 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 18
andi a0, a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 0

# 841 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0x20000
csrrw x0, mstatus, a0
csrrs a1, mstatus, x0
li t0,0x30000
and a1, a1, t0
srli a1, a1, 16
# Result: a1 = 2

# 842 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0xC000
csrrw a2, 0x300, a1
csrr a0, 0x300
li a1, 0xC000
and a0, a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 843 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x3000
csrs mstatus, a1
csrr a0, mstatus
srl a0, a0, 3
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 844 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xC00
csrrw a1, 0x300, a0
csrr a2, 0x300
and a2, a2, a0
# Result: a2 = 0

# 845 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x100
csrw mstatus, a0
csrr a1, mstatus
srli a1, a1, 8
andi a1, a1, 0x3
mv a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 846 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xff
csrw mstatus, a0
csrr a1, mstatus
li a2, 0xff
and a1, a1, a2
# Result: a1 = 0

# 847 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0x40
csrw mstatush, a0
csrr a1, mstatush
# Result: a1 = 0x40

# 848 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x7000000000
csrs mstatus, a1
csrr a0, mstatush
# Result: a0 = 0x70

# 849 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
csrw 0x310, a0
csrr a1, 0x310
# Result: a1 = 0x4f0

# 850 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw mstatus, zero
li t0, 0xa
csrs mstatus, t0
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 = 0xa

# 851 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x8
csrrc x0, mstatus, a1
csrr a0, mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x8
csrrs x0, mstatus, a1
csrr a0, mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x8
# Result: a0 = 0x8

# 852 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, (1 << 1) # set SIE bit in mstatus
csrs mstatus, a0

li a0, (1 << 5) # delegate supervisor timer interrupt (STIP) to S-mode
csrs mideleg, a0

li a0, (1 << 5) # set pending supervisor timer interrupt
csrs mip, a0

addi a0, a0, 1 # instruction that would be skipped if interrupt taken

# Result: mcause = 0

# 853 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 8
csrrc zero, mstatus, t0
call machine_to_supervisor
li t1, 2
csrrs zero, sie, t1
csrs sip, t1
wfi
# Result: a0 = 1

# 854 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x22
csrrw x0, mstatus, a1
csrr a2, mstatus
and a2, a2, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 855 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrs mstatus, 0x8
ecall
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 7
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 856 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_user
ecall
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 11
andi a0, a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 0

# 857 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrs mstatus, 0x8 # set MIE = 1
call machine_to_supervisor
ecall # trap from S-mode to M-mode
csrr a0, mstatus # read mstatus in M-mode trap handler
and a0, a0, 0x80 # isolate MPIE (bit 7) – should be 0x80 (previous MIE)
csrr a1, mstatus
and a1, a1, 0x1800 # isolate MPP bits (12:11) – should be 0x800 (Supervisor mode)
# Result: a0 = 0x80 & a1 = 0x800

# 858 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrrci a0, mstatus, 0x8
csrrsi a0, mstatus, 0x80
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 1

# 859 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x800
csrw mstatus, a0
mret
li a1, 0x2
csrs sstatus, a1
csrr a0, sstatus
# Result: a0 = 0x2

# 860 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a1, 0x300 # a1 = mstatus
li a2, -0x81 # clear MPIE (bit 7): mask with all 1s except bit7=0
and a1, a1, a2
csrw 0x300, a1 # write back cleared MPIE

csrr a1, 0x300 # a1 = mstatus
li a2, -0x1800 # clear MPP bits (12..11)
and a1, a1, a2
li a2, 0x1800 # set MPP to 3 (binary 11) for M-mode
or a1, a1, a2
csrw 0x300, a1 # write back MPP = M

mret # return (stays in M-mode, sets MPIE=1)

csrr a0, 0x300 # a0 = mstatus
srli a0, a0, 7 # shift MPIE to bit 0
andi a0, a0, 1 # isolate MPIE bit
# Result: a0 = 1

# 861 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0x1800
ori a0, a0, a1
csrw mstatus, a0
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
srai a0, a0, 11
andi a0, a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 0

# 862 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x20800
csrw mstatus, a0
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x20000
# Result: a0 = 0

# 863 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1000
or a0, a0, a0
csrw 0x300, a0
csrr a1, 0x300
# Result: a1 != 0x1000

# 864 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x100
csrrw a1, mstatus, a0
csrr a2, mstatus
srli a2, a2, 8
# Result: a2 = 0

# 865 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x800
csrrw zero, mstatus, a0
csrrs a1, mstatus, zero
li a2, 0x1800
and a1, a1, a2
# Result: a1 = 0x800

# 866 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0
csrw mstatus, t0
csrr a0, mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x1800
# Result: a0 = 0

# 867 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, 0x300
srli a0, a0, 42
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 868 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 != 0xffffffffffffffff

# 869 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrs mstatus, 0x8
csrs mstatus, 0x40000000000
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 3
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 870 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8
csrrw a1, mstatus, a0
csrr a2, mstatus
srli a2, a2, 3
andi a2, a2, 1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 871 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x4000000000
csrw mstatus, a0
li a1, 0x8
csrw mstatus, a1
csrr a2, mstatus
# Result: a2 = 0x8

# 872 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x4000000000
csrrc x0, mstatus, a1
la a0, trap_handler
csrw mtvec, a0
ecall
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0x4000000000
and a0, a0, a1
trap_handler:
csrr a2, mstatus
mret
# Result: a0 = 0x4000000000

# 873 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrrwi a0, mstatus, 0 # clear mstatus (sets MDT=0, MIE=0)
csrs mstatus, 0x8 # set MIE = 1 (bit 3)
csrc mstatus, 0x4000000000 # ensure MDT = 0 (clear bit 42)
ecall # take a trap into M‑mode
csrr a1, mstatus # read mstatus after trap entry
and a2, a1, 0x8 # isolate MIE bit
# Result: a2 = 0

# 874 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrs mstatus, 0x4000000000
ecall
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0x4000000000
and a0, a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0x4000000000

# 875 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x4000000000 # Set mstatus.MDT = 1 (bit 42)
csrw 0x300, a0 # Write to mstatus
li a1, 0x8 # Bit mask for mstatus.MIE (bit 3)
csrs 0x300, a1 # Attempt to set MIE while MDT=1 (should trap)
csrr a2, 0x342 # Read mcause into a2
# Result: a2 = 2

# 876 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x4000000000
csrrs x0, mstatus, a0
li a0, 0x8
csrrs x0, mstatus, a0
# Result: mcause = 2

# 877 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x8
csrs mstatus, a1
li a1, 0x40000000000
csrw mstatus, a1
csrr a0, mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x8
# Result: a0 = 0

# 878 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x4000000000
csrrs x0, mstatus, a0
mret
csrr a1, mstatus
andi a1, a1, 0x4000000000
# Result: a1 = 0

# 879 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x4000000000
csrrs x0, mstatus, a1
sret
csrr a0, mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x4000000000
# Result: a0 = 0

# 880 # Extension Must Be Active: H
li a0, 0x40000000800
csrw mstatus, a0
mnret
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 = 0x800

# 881 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, 8
csrw mstatus, a1

csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 = 0x8

# 882 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 883 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 884 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0x800000000

# 885 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0

# 886 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 887 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 888 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 889 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 890 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrr a0, 0x300
and a1, a0, a2
# Result: a1 = 0

# 891 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 & 0x0000000300000000 != 0x0000000100000000

# 892 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw mstatus, a0
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 893 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678ABCDEF01
call machine_to_supervisor
add a1, a0, x0
# Result: a1 = 0x00000000ABCDEF01

# 894 # Extension Must Be Active: S
li t0, (1 << 34)
csrs mstatus, t0
call machine_to_supervisor
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 895 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFCFFFF
and a0, a0, a1
csrw mstatus, a0
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFF80001000
csrw mepc, a0
call machine_to_supervisor

# Result: a0 = 0

# 896 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw mstatus,a0

# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 897 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 0x800000000
li a2, 0x100000000

# Result: a0 = 0x900000000

# 898 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0

# 899 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw mstatus, t0
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li a1, 0x123456789ABCDEF0
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x123456789ABCDEF0

# 900 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1234abcd1234abcd
li a1, 0x80020000
li t0, 0x20000
csrrc zero, mstatus, t0
sd a0, 0(a1)
ld a0, 0(a1)
# Result: a0 = 0x1234abcd1234abcd

# 901 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x80001000
li a0, 0x1122334455667788
sd a0, 0(a1)

li t0, (1 << 17) # set MPRV
csrs mstatus, t0

li t1, (3 << 11) # clear MPP bits to 00 (U-mode)
csrc mstatus, t1

li t2, (1 << 6) # set UBE (user mode big‑endian)
csrs mstatus, t2

ld a2, 0(a1) # load interpreted as U‑mode big‑endian

# Result: a2 = 0x8877665544332211

# 902 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0,0x20800
csrw mstatus, t0
call machine_to_supervisor
mret
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 2

# 903 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x20000
csrrw a1, 0x300, a0
csrr a2, 0x300
and a2, a2, a0
# Result: a2 = 0

# 904 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0,0x20800
csrw mstatus,t0
mret
csrr a0,mstatus
andi a1,a0,0x20000
# Result: a1 = 0

# 905 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0xdeadbeef
li a2, 0x1000
sd a1, 0(a2)
li t0, 0x20800
csrw 0x300, t0
li a2, 0x10000001000
ld a0, 0(a2)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeef

# 906 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x80000
csrrc x0, 0x300, a1
li a0, 0x2000
lw a2, 0(a0)
# Result: mcause = 5

# 907 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, (1 << 19) # clear mstatus.MXR (bit 19)
csrrc zero, mstatus, t0
li a0, 0x80000000 # address whose PTE lacks the R bit
lw a1, 0(a0) # load should fault
# Result: mcause = 13

# 908 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr t0, mstatus
li t1, 0x80000
or t0, t0, t1
csrw mstatus, t0
li a1, 0x80002000
ld a0, 0(a1)
# Result: a0 != 0

# 909 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
sd a0,0x2000(zero)
li t0, (1 << 19)
csrrw zero, mstatus, t0
ld a1,0x2000(zero)
# Result: a1 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 910 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80000
csrs mstatus, a0
csrr a1, mstatus
andi a1, a1, 0x80000
# Result: a1 = 0

# 911 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
sd a0, 0x1000(zero)
li t0, (1 << 18)
csrrc t1, mstatus, t0
csrrs t1, mstatus, t0
call machine_to_supervisor
ld a0, 0x1000(zero)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 912 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a2, 0x40000
csrc mstatus, a2
li a1, 0x80002000
call machine_to_supervisor
lw a0, 0(a1)
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: mcause = 13

# 913 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
li a1, 0x00001000
sd a0, 0(a1)
call machine_to_supervisor
li a0, 0x40000
csrs sstatus, a0
li a1, 0x00001000
ld a0, 0(a1)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 914 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t2, 0x12345678
sd t2, 0x1000(zero)
call machine_to_supervisor
li t0, 0x40000
csrrs x0, mstatus, t0
li t1, 0
csrw satp, t1
ld a0, 0x1000(zero)
# Result: a0 = 0x12345678

# 915 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, (1 << 18) | (1 << 17) | (1 << 11)
csrw mstatus, a1
li a2, 0x1000
lw a0, 0(a2)
# Result: a0 != 0

# 916 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x40000 # attempt to set SUM bit (bit 18) in mstatus
csrw mstatus, a0 # write to mstatus
csrr a1, mstatus # read back mstatus
srli a1, a1, 18 # shift SUM bit to LSB
andi a1, a1, 1 # mask other bits, isolate SUM
# Result: a1 = 0

# 917 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0xC0000
csrrs x0, 0x300, a1
csrr a0, 0x300
li a2, 0xC0000
and a0, a0, a2
# Result: a0 != 0

# 918 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, (1 << 19) | (1 << 18) # set MXR and SUM in mstatus
csrs mstatus, a0
li a0, 0x20000000 # pmpaddr0 = 0x80000000 >> 2
csrw pmpaddr0, a0
li a0, 0x0 # pmpcfg0 = 0 (no R/W/X permissions)
csrw pmpcfg0, a0
li a1, 0x80000000 # address that will be denied by PMP
lw a2, 0(a1) # trigger load access‑fault
# Result: mcause = 0x5

# 919 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0
li a1, 0x1000000000
csrrs x0, mstatus, a1
csrr a0, mstatus
srai a0, a0, 36
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 != 0x2

# 920 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, (1 << 17) # mask for MPRV bit
csrrc x0, mstatus, t0 # ensure MPRV = 0
li t0, (1 << 37) # mask for MBE bit
csrrs x0, mstatus, t0 # set MBE = 1 (big‑endian)

li a0, 0x100000 # test memory address
li a1, 0x1122334455667788 # value to store
sd a1, 0(a0) # store 64‑bit value

lbu a2, 0(a0) # load first byte (endianness test)
# Result: a2 = 0x11

# 921 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80003000
li a1, 0x1122334455667788
li a2, 0x2000000000 # mask for MBE (bit 37)
csrrc x0, 0x300, a2 # clear MBE -> little‑endian
sd a1, 0(a0) # store 64‑bit value
lbu a2, 0(a0) # load first byte
# Result: a2 = 0x88

# 922 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x2000000000
csrrs zero, 0x300, a1
li a2, 0x80001000
li a1, 0x00100513
sw a1, 0(a2)
jalr x0, 0(a2)
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 923 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0x1000000000
and a0, a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 924 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1000000000
csrw mstatus, a0
csrr a0, mstatus
srl a0, a0, 36
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 925 # Extension Must Be Active: S
call machine_to_supervisor
li a0, 0x1000000000 # 1 << 36 sets SBE
csrw mstatus, a0
li a1, 0x80002000
li a0, 0x11223344
sw a0, 0(a1)
lbu a2, 0(a1)
# Result: a2 = 0x11

# 926 # Extension Must Be Active: S
li t0, (1 << 36) # set SBE bit mask
csrr t1, mstatus
or t1, t1, t0
csrw mstatus, t1 # set mstatus.SBE = 1 (big‑endian)
li a1, 0x0102030405060708
li a0, 0x80002000
call machine_to_supervisor
sd a1, 0(a0) # store doubleword in S‑mode (big‑endian)
lb a2, 0(a0) # load first byte back in M‑mode
# Result: a2 = 0x1

# 927 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0x1000000000 # (1 << 36) set SBE bit
or a0, a0, a1
csrw mstatus, a0
csrr a2, mstatus
andi a2, a2, 0x1000000000
# Result: a2 = 0x1000000000

# 928 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x1000000000
csrs mstatus, t0
sfence.vma x0, x0
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 929 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x40
csrrw a0, 0x300, a1
csrr a0, 0x300
and a0, a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 930 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 936 # Extension Must Be Active: S

# 937 # Extension Must Be Active: U

call machine_to_user

andi a0, a0, 0x40
or a0, a0, x0 # NOP using OR
# Result: a0 = 0x40

# 938 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 1

# 939 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 940 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 977 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

unimp # illegal instruction triggers a trap delegated to S‑mode

andi a0, a0, 1 # mask SPP bit
# Result: a0 = 0

# 978 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

andi a0, a0, 0x2
# Result: a0 = 0

# 980 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 3

# 981 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

handler:

andi a0, a0, 0x80

# Result: a0 = 0x80

# 982 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

andi a1, a1, 1
# Result: a1 = 1

# 983 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a0, 0x800
csrrs x0, mie, a0
wfi
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 0xb

# 984 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrrc x0, mstatus, 0x8
csrs mip, 0x8
call machine_to_supervisor
# Result: mcause = 0x8000000000000003

# 985 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw mstatus, x0 # Clear all status bits, MIE=0
csrs mstatus, (1 << 5) # Set MPIE=1 (will restore MIE on mret)
csrs mie, (1 << 3) # Enable machine software interrupt (MSIE)
csrs mip, (1 << 3) # Set pending machine software interrupt
mret # Return; MIE restored, pending interrupt should be re‑evaluated
csrr a0, mstatus # Read back mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x8 # Isolate MIE bit (bit 3)

# Result: a0 = 0x8

# 986 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80
csrs mip, a0
li a0, 0x8
csrs mstatus, a0
# Result: mcause = 0x8000000000000007

# 987 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x400000
csrs mstatus, a0
call machine_to_supervisor
# Result: mcause = 2

# 988 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrs mstatus, 0x400000 # Set TSR bit (bit 22) in mstatus
call machine_to_supervisor # Switch to S-mode without using MRET
sret # Should raise illegal‑instruction exception
csrr a0, mcause # Capture exception cause
# Result: a0 = 0x2

# 989 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x200000
csrrs x0, 0x300, a0
wfi
# Result: mcause = 2

# 990 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0
csrw mstatus, a0
li a0, (1 << 3)
csrw mie, a0
li a0, (1 << 3)
csrw mip, a0
la t0, trap_handler
csrw mtvec, t0
wfi
trap_handler:
csrr a0, mcause
li t1, 0
csrw mip, t1
mret
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000003

# 991 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0
csrw mstatus, a1
li a1, 8 # 1 << 3 (MSIE)
csrs mie, a1
csrs mip, a1
wfi
addi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 992 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 3
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 993 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 994 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

call machine_to_supervisor
sfence.vma x0, x0
# Result: mcause = 2

# 1038 # Extension Must Be Active: H
call machine_to_supervisor
li a0, 0
csrw sstatus, a0
hfence.gvma x0, x0
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1039 # Extension Must Be Active: H
li a0, 0x00101000
csrw mstatus, a0
call machine_to_supervisor
hfence.gvma
# Result: mcause = 2

# 1040 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x100000 # set TVM bit (bit 20) in a0
csrrw x0, mstatus, a0 # write to mstatus CSR, TVM=1 (other bits cleared)
hfence.gvma x0, x0 # should execute without trap in M-mode
li a1, 1 # indicate success
# Result: a1 = 1

# 1041 # Extension Must Be Active: H
csrs mstatus, 0x100000
hfence.vvma x0, x0
# Result: mcause = 0

# 1042 # Extension Must Be Active: H
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1043 # Extension Must Be Active: H
csrr a1, mstatus
li t0, 0x8000020000
csrrs zero, mstatus, t0
csrr a2, mstatus
srli t1, a2, 39
andi t1, t1, 1
mv a0, t1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1044 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, 0x300
csrr a1, 0x310
li a2, 0xC000000000
and a0, a0, a2
and a1, a1, a2
# Result: a0 != 0x0 & a1 = 0x0

# 1045 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x200 # set VS field bit 9 (value 1)
csrrs x0, mstatus, t0
call machine_to_supervisor
ecall
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 39
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1046 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x8000001000
csrw mstatus, t0
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 9
andi a0, a0, 0x3
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1047 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0x4000000000
or a0, a0, a1
csrw mstatus, a0
ebreak
csrr a0, mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x4000000000
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1048 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1001
ld a1, 0(a0)
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 38
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1049 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
unimp
csrr a0, mstatus
srl a0, a0, 38
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1050 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, (1 << 21)
csrrs zero, mstatus, a0
wfi
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1051 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x20000 # 1 << 17, mask for MPRV
csrrc x0, mstatus, t0 # clear MPRV (bit 17) in mstatus
csrr a0, mstatus # read mstatus into a0
and a0, a0, t0 # isolate MPRV bit
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1052 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
li t1, 0x80003000
sd t0, 0(t1)
li t2, 0x20000
csrw mstatus, t2
ld a0, 0(t1)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 1053 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x20000
csrw mstatus, t0
li a1, 0x1000
lw a2, 0(a1)
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1054 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0x21000
csrw mstatus, a0
# Result: a0 = 0x21000

# 1055 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x21800
csrs mstatus, a0
csrr a1, mstatus
li a2, 0x21800
and a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0x21800

# 1056 # Extension Must Be Active: H
li a0, 0x80001000
li a2, 0x1122334455667788
sd a2, 0(a0)
li t0, (1 << 17) # set MPRV=1, keep other bits 0
csrw mstatus, t0
li t1, (1 << 8) # set hstatus.SPVP=1
csrw hstatus, t1
hlv a1, 0(a0)
ld a2, 0(a0)
# Result: a1 = 0x1122334455667788

# 1057 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x2
csrw sstatus, a0
csrr a1, mstatus
# Result: a1 = 0x2

# 1058 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f

# 1059 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x200000
csrs mstatus, a0
wfi
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 != 0

# 1060 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x600
csrw mstatus, t0
ebreak
csrr t1, mstatus
srli t1, t1, 9
andi t1, t1, 3
mv a0, t1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1061 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x8 # set MIE=1 (bit 3), GVA=0, MPIE=0
csrw mstatus, t0
call machine_to_user
ecall # trap to M‑mode
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 & 0x4000000000 != 0 & a0 & 0x80 != 0 & a0 & 0x8 = 0

# 1062 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000001800
csrw mstatus, a0
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 11
andi a0, a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1063 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0
csrw mstatus, t0
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x8
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1064 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x800
csrw mstatus, t0
li t1, 0x80000120
csrw mepc, t1
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 = 0x800

# 1065 # Extension Must Be Active: H
li a0, 0x8000000000
csrs mstatus, a0
mret
csrr a1, mstatus
srl a1, a1, 39
andi a1, a1, 1
# Result: a1 = 0

# 1066 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, -0x1800
and a0, a0, a1
li a1, 0x800
or a0, a0, a1
csrw mstatus, a0
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 11
andi a0, a0, 0x3
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1067 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x1880
csrw mstatus, t0
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 = 0x88

# 1068 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw mstatus, zero
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
srli a0, a0, 7
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1069 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x800 # Set MPP = 01 (Supervisor)
csrw mstatus, t0 # Write to mstatus
li t1, 0x80000126 # mepc points to the instruction after mret
csrw mepc, t1
mret
csrr a0, mstatus # Read mstatus after mret
andi a0, a0, 0x1800 # Mask MPP bits (bits 12..11)
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1070 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
ecall
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0x40000000
and a0, a0, a1
# Result: a0 != 0

# 1071 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 1
csrrs x0, sstatus, a0
csrrs a0, sstatus, x0
# Result: a0 != 0

# 1072 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x100
csrw medeleg, t0
li a0, 0x1
ecall
csrr a1, mstatus
srli a1, a1, 12
andi a1, a1, 1
# Result: a1 = 0x1

# 1073 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrs mstatus, 0x1
ecall
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 = 0x0

# 1074 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
or a0, zero, zero
li a1, 0x1
csrw mstatus, a1
call machine_to_supervisor
csrr a0, mstatus
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1075 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1000000000000
csrrs x0, mstatus, a0
li a1, 0x1800
csrrs x0, mstatus, a1
mret
csrr a0, mstatus
li a1, 0x1000000000000
and a0, a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1076 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 0x0c000000
csrs mstatus, a0
ecall
csrr a1, mstatus
and a2, a1, a0
# Result: a2 = 0x0c000000

# 1077 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, 0x300
# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1078 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
csrr a0, 0x300
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1079 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_user
csrr a0, 0x300
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1080 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrs 0x300, a0
csrr a1, 0x300
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x8000000000000000

# 1081 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x20000

# 1094 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x8000

# 1095 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0x2000

# 1096 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 1097 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 1098 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 1099 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0x40

# 1100 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0x20

# 1101 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0x8

# 1102 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0x2

# 1103 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 != 0xffffffff & a1 != 0xffffffffffffffff

# 1104 # Extension Must Be Active: F

# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1105 # Extension Must Be Active: H
csrr a0, 0x300
# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1106 # Extension Must Be Active: V
csrr a0, 0x300
# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1107 # Extension Must Be Active: Zfinx
csrr a0, 0x300
# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1108 # Extension Must Be Active: Zicfilp
csrr a0, 0x300
# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1109 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x5
csrw 0x305, a0
csrr a1, 0x305
li a2, 0x3
and a2, a1, a2
# Result: a2 = 0x0

# 1110 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, 0x305
# Result: a0 != 0xffffffffffffffff

# 1111 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
csrw mtvec, a0
csrr a0, mtvec
# Result: a0 != 0xffffffffffffffff

# 1112 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80000003
csrw 0x305, a0
csrr a1, 0x305
li a2, 0x3
and a2, a1, a2
# Result: a2 = 0

# 1113 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x3
csrw mtvec, a1
csrr a0, mtvec
li a2, 0x3
and a0, a0, a2
# Result: a0 != 0x3

# 1114 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0,0x80001000
csrw mtvec,t0
.word 0xffffffff
# ---- handler placed at 0x80001000 ----
li a0,0xdeadbeef
li t1,0x80000120
csrw mepc,t1
mret
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeef

# 1115 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80000120
ori t0, t0, 0x1
csrw mtvec, t0
jal x0, 8
li a0, 1
mret
ecall
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1116 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80001000
ori t0, t0, 1 # set MODE = Vectored (bit0 = 1)
csrw mtvec, t0 # mtvec = 0x80001001 (BASE=0x80001000, Vectored)

csrs mstatus, 0x8 # set MIE in mstatus
csrs mie, 0x80 # enable machine‑timer interrupt (MTIE)

# program timer to fire immediately
li t1, 0x0200bff8 # address of mtime
ld t2, 0(t1) # t2 = mtime
addi t2, t2, 1 # t2 = mtime + 1
li t3, 0x02004000 # address of mtimecmp
sd t2, 0(t3) # mtimecmp = mtime + 1

wfi # wait for interrupt

# ---- interrupt vector entry (mtvec.BASE + 4*7 = 0x8000101c) ----
csrr a0, mepc # a0 = address where PC was set by the interrupt
csrr a1, mcause # a1 = interrupt cause (should be 0x80000007)

# Result
# Result: a0 = 0x8000101c & a1 = 0x80000007

# 1117 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x80002001
csrw mtvec, a1
csrr a0, mtvec
# Result: a0 = 0x80002001

# 1118 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x2003
csrw mtvec, a0
csrr a1, mtvec
# Result: a1 = 0x2000

# 1119 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80001001
csrw mtvec, a0
csrr a0, mtvec
# Result: a0 = 0x80001001

# 1120 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1,0x80000120
csrw mtvec,a1
csrrw x0,0xdead,x0
li a0,1
mret
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1121 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, 0x305
# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1122 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
csrr a0, 0x305
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1123 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_user
csrr a0, 0x305
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1124 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x4
csrs 0x305, a0
csrr a1, 0x305
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x4

# 1125 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1
csrs 0x305, a0
csrr a1, 0x305
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x1

# 1126 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xffffffffffffffff
csrw 0x305, a0
csrr a1, 0x305
# Result: a1 != 0xffffffff & a1 != 0xffffffffffffffff

# 1127 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678abcdef03
csrw pmpaddr0, a0
csrr a1, pmpaddr0
# Result: a1 = 0x12345678abcdef00

# 1128 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0xc0000000
csrw 0x3b0, a1
csrr a0, 0x3b0
# Result: a0 = 0xc0000000

# 1129 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x123456789ABCDEF
csrw 0x3b0, a1
csrr a0, 0x3b0
# Result: a0 = 0x123456789ABCDEC

# 1130 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
csrw 0x3b0, a0
csrr a0,0x3b0
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 1131 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x3

csrr a0, pmpaddr0
# Result: a0 != 0x3

# 1132 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, pmpaddr0
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1133 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
csrr a0, 0x3b0
csrr a0, 0x342
# Result: a0 = 0x2

# 1134 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1,0xffffffffffffffff
csrw pmpaddr0,a1
csrr a0,pmpaddr0
or a0,a0,x0
# Result: a0 != 0

# 1135 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x1
csrw 0x3a0, t0
li t1, 0x4000
csrw 0x3b0, t1
li a0, 0x10000
ld a1, 0(a0)
# Result: mcause = 0x5

# 1136 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
csrw 0x3b0, a0
csrr a1, 0x3b0
# Result: a1 = 0xfffffffffffffffc

# 1137 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xffffffff12345678
csrw 0x3b0, a0
csrr a0, 0x3b0
# Result: a0 = 0x12345678

# 1138 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw pmpcfg0, 0x08
csrw pmpaddr0, 0x123456789ABC0100
csrr a0, pmpaddr0
andi a1, a0, 0xff
# Result: a1 = 0x0

# 1139 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x3
csrw 0x3A0, a0 # set pmpcfg0.A = NAPOT
li a0, 0x8
csrw 0x3B0, a0 # write pmpaddr0 with granularity G=3
csrr a1, 0x3B0 # read pmpaddr0
andi a2, a1, 0x3 # extract bits [G‑2:0]
# Result: a2 = 0x3

# 1140 # Extension Must Be Active: PMP
li a0, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
csrw pmpaddr0, a0
li a1, 0x01
csrw pmpcfg0, a1
li a1, 0x00
csrw pmpcfg0, a1
li a1, 0x01
csrw pmpcfg0, a1
csrr a2, pmpaddr0
and a0, a2, a0
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 1141 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x16
csrw pmpcfg0, t0
li t1, 0x8000100F
csrw pmpaddr0, t1
li t2, 0x80001003
li t3, 0xAB
sb t3, 0(t2)
lb a0, 0(t2)
# Result: a0 = 0xab

# 1142 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x10
csrw 0x3b0, a0
csrr a1, 0x3b0
mv a0, a1
neg a2, a0
and a0, a0, a2
slli a0, a0, 2
li a2, 0x40
# Result: a0 = 0x40

# 1143 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, 0x3b0
# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1144 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
csrr a0, 0x3b0
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1145 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_user
csrr a0, 0x3b0
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1146 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x1

# 1147 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 != 0xffffffff & a1 != 0xffffffffffffffff

# 1148 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0x8f

# 1149 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

srli a1, a0, 32
li a2, 0xffffffff
and a0, a0, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff & a1 = 0

# 1150 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, 0x3a0
and a1, a0, a0
# Result: a1 = 0

# 1151 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrrs a0, 0x3a0, x0
li a1, 0xff
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 1152 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
csrr a0, pmpcfg0
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1153 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, -1
csrw pmpcfg0, a1
csrr a2, pmpcfg0
li a0, 0x6060606060606060
and a0, a2, a0
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1154 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x08
csrw pmpcfg0, t0
li t1, 0x20000000
csrw pmpaddr0, t1
li t2, 0x20004000
csrw pmpaddr1, t2
call machine_to_supervisor
ld a0, 0x80000120
# Result: mcause = 0x5

# 1155 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x2
csrw 0x3a0, a0
csrr a0, 0x3a0
andi a0, a0, 0x2
# Result: a0 = 0x2

# 1156 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x200004
csrw pmpaddr0, a0
li a1, 0x09
csrw pmpcfg0, a1
call machine_to_supervisor
li a0, 1
ecall
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1157 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x10
csrw pmpcfg0, a1
csrr a0, pmpcfg0
srli a0, a0, 3
andi a0, a0, 0x3
# Result: a0 = 2

# 1158 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a0, 0x0
csrrw x0, pmpcfg0, a0
csrr a1, pmpcfg0
# Result: a1 = 0x87

# 1159 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a0, 0x60
and a2, a1, a0
# Result: a2 = 0

# 1160 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw pmpcfg0, a0
csrr a0, pmpcfg0
# Result: a0 = 0x0

# 1161 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw pmpcfg0, a0

srli t0, t0, 2
csrw pmpaddr0, t0
li a2,0x80002000
li a1,0x13
sw a1,0(a2)
jal x0,0x80002000
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1162 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x0A
csrw pmpcfg0, a0
li a0, 0x800
csrw pmpaddr0, a0
li a0, 0xC00

call machine_to_user
li a0, 0x2004
ld a1, 0(a0)
# Result: mcause = 0x5

# 1163 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x88000000
li a1, 0xdeadbeef
li t0, 0x10
csrw pmpcfg0, t0
csrw pmpaddr0, a0
sw a1, 0(a0)
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 0x7

# 1164 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw pmpaddr0,zero
csrw pmpaddr1,a0

csrw pmpcfg0,a1
li a1,0x8888

# Result: a2 = 0x8988

# 1165 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrrs a0, pmpcfg1, x0
# Result: mcause = 2

# 1166 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x07
csrw pmpcfg0, t0
csrr a0, pmpcfg0
# Result: a0 = 0x7

# 1167 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

andi a0, a0, 0x18
# Result: a0 = 0x08

# 1168 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrr a0, pmpcfg0
# Result: a0 = 0x17

# 1169 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0x2000043

# 1170 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a0, 0x0

csrr a0, 0x3b0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# 1171 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw 0x3a0, x0
li a2, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
csrw 0x3b0, a2
csrr a0, 0x3b0
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1172 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x80002000
li a0, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
sd a0, 0(a1)

li t0, 0x20000803 # pmpaddr0 with low bits set to 0b11
csrw pmpaddr0, t0
li t1, 0x20000C00 # pmpaddr1 (upper bound)
csrw pmpaddr1, t1
li t2, 0x09 # pmp0cfg: TOR, R=1
csrw pmpcfg0, t2

call machine_to_supervisor

li a2, 0x80002000
ld a0, 0(a2)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 1173 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0,0x1F
csrw 0x3a0,t0
li t1,0x123456789ABCDEF0
csrw 0x3b0,t1
csrr a1,0x3b0
li t0,0x07
csrw 0x3a0,t0
li t0,0x1F
csrw 0x3a0,t0
csrr a0,0x3b0
xor a2,a0,a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# 1174 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw pmpcfg0, x0
csrr a0, pmpcfg0
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1175 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw pmpcfg0, zero
li t0, -1
csrw pmpaddr0, t0
csrr a0, pmpaddr0
# Result: a0 != 0

# 1176 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw pmpaddr0, a0

and a1, a0, 7
# Result: a1 = 0

# 1177 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff

# 1178 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: mcause = 0x0

# 1179 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrr a0, 0x3a0
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1180 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrr a0, 0x3a0
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1181 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0x100000000000000

# 1189 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw 0x3a0, a0
csrr a1, 0x3a0
# Result: a1 != 0xffffffff & a1 != 0xffffffffffffffff

# 1190 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x92340000deadbeef
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
# Result: a1 = 0x92340000deadbeef

# 1191 # Extension Must Be Active: S
li a0, (8 << 60) # MODE=Sv39, ASID=0, PPN=0
csrw satp, a0
call machine_to_supervisor
nop
# Result: mcause = 0xc

# 1192 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
call machine_to_supervisor
nop
csrrs a1, satp, x0
# Result: a1 = 0x8000000000000000

# 1193 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x1000
csrw satp, a1
csrr a0, satp
andi a0, a0, 0x1000
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1194 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0
csrw satp, a0
li a0, 0x40000
csrw sstatus, a0
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1195 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li t0, 0x00100000 # set TVM bit (bit 20) in mstatus
csrs mstatus, t0
csrr a0, satp # should trigger illegal‑instruction exception
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1196 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x100000
csrrc t1, mstatus, t0
call machine_to_supervisor
li t0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, t0
csrr a0, satp
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000000

# 1197 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x8000000000000001

csrr a0, 0x180
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000001

# 1198 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xF000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
# Result: mcause = 2

# 1199 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xF000000000000000
csrw satp, t0
csrr t1, satp
srli t1, t1, 60
andi t1, t1, 0xF
mv a1, t1
li t0, 0x1
csrw menvcfg, t0
csrr t2, menvcfg
andi t2, t2, 0x1
mv a0, t2
# Result: a0 = 0 & a1 = 0

# 1200 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678
csrw satp, x0
sfence.vma
sw a0, 0x90000000
lw a1, 0x90000000
# Result: a1 = 0x12345678

# 1201 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
li a1, 0x0123000000000000
li a2, 0xdeadbeef
or a0, a0, a1
or a0, a0, a2
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
# Result: a1 = 0x81230000deadbeef

# 1202 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x4000000000000000
csrw menvcfg, a0
csrr a1, menvcfg
# Result: a1 = 0x4000000000000000

# 1203 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
la t1, trap_handler
csrw mtvec, t1
csrw satp, zero # MODE = 0 (Bare)
li t0, (1 << 18) # bit 18 = SUM
csrrs sstatus, sstatus, t0 # attempt to set SUM – should trap
j done # should not be reached

trap_handler:
csrr a0, mcause # capture exception cause (2 = illegal instruction)
mret

done:
# Result: a0 = 0x2

# 1204 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw satp, x0
li a1, 0x40000
csrs sstatus, a1
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 2

# 1205 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, (1 << 60) # attempt to set satp.MODE to a non‑zero value
csrw satp, t0
li t1, 1 # attempt to set FIOM bit in senvcfg
csrw senvcfg, t1
csrr a0, senvcfg # read back senvcfg
andi a0, a0, 1 # isolate FIOM bit
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1206 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrr a0, satp
li a1, 0xf000000000000000
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x0

# 1207 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0x8000000000080004
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
li a2,0xfffffffffff
and a1, a1, a2
# Result: a1 = 0x80004

# 1208 # Extension Must Be Active: S
li a0, 0x1000000000012345
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
# Result: a1 = 0x1000000000012345

# 1209 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0xffffffffffffffff
li a1,0x8fffffffffffff
and a0,a0,a1
csrw satp,a0
csrr a2,mcause
# Result: a2 = 0x2

# 1210 # Extension Must Be Active: S
call machine_to_supervisor
li a0, 0x9234000000000000
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
srl a2, a1, 44
andi a2, a2, 0xFFFF
# Result: a2 = 0x1234

# 1211 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 8
slli a0, a0, 60
li a1, 1
slli a1, a1, 44
or a0, a0, a1
csrw satp, a0
# Result: mcause = 2

# 1212 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8FFFF00000000000
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
srli a1, a1, 44
andi a1, a1, 0xFFFF
# Result: a1 != 0

# 1213 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# 1214 # Extension Must Be Active: S

# 1225 # Extension Must Be Active: S

# Result: mcause = 2

# 1226 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80123000deadbeef

li a1, 0xF0123000deadbeef

csrr a0, satp
and a0, a0, a0
# Result: a0 = 0x80123000deadbeef

# 1227 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 0x8000000000000000

# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000000

# 1228 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, t0
call machine_to_supervisor
li t1, 0x400000
lw a0, 0(t1)
# Result: a0 = 0xd

# 1229 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t2,0xdeadbeef
li t3,0x1000
sw t2,0(t3)
li t0,0x8000000000000000
csrw satp,t0
lw a0,0(t3)
csrw satp,x0
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeef

# 1230 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a2,0x80001 # a2 = 0x80001000 (page table root)
lui a3,0x2000 # a3 = 0x20000000 (upper bits of PTE)
ori a3,a3,0x80F # a3 = 0x2000080F (leaf PTE)
sd a3,0(a2) # store PTE in page table

lui a1,0x80002 # a1 = 0x80002000 (physical page for data)
lui a4,0x12345 # a4 = 0x12345000
addi a4,a4,0x678 # a4 = 0x12345678 (test data)
sd a4,0(a1) # store test data

lui a6,0x80001 # a6 = 0x80001000 (high 32 bits of satp)
slli a6,a6,32 # a6 = 0x80001000_00000000
lui a7,0x800 # a7 = 0x800000
addi a7,a7,0x1 # a7 = 0x800001 (low 32 bits of satp)
or a6,a6,a7 # a6 = satp value
csrw satp,a6 # write satp CSR (Sv39, ASID=1)

lui a0,0x80000 # a0 = 0x80000000 (virtual address)
addi a1,x0,1 # a1 = 1 (ASID)
sfence.vma a0,a1 # flush TLB for matching address and ASID

ld a0,0(a0) # load from virtual address into a0
# Result: a0 = 0x12345678

# 1231 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000a000
li a1, 0x1111111111111111
sd a1, 0(a0)

li a0, 0x8000b000
li a1, 0x2222222222222222
sd a1, 0(a0)

li a0, 0x80020000 # page table base
li a1, 0x8000a007 # PTE mapping VA 0x0 -> PA 0x8000a000 (R,W,V)
sd a1, 0(a0) # store first PTE

li a1, 0x8000000000080020 # satp: MODE=8 (Sv39), PPN=0x80020
csrw satp, a1 # enable virtual memory

li a1, 0x8000b007 # update PTE to map VA 0x0 -> PA 0x8000b000
sd a1, 0(a0)

li a2, 0x0
ld a0, 0(a2) # load through virtual address 0x0
# Result: a0 = 0x2222222222222222

# 1232 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0x80020000
li a1,0x80021001
sd a1,0(a0)
li a0,0x80021000
li a1,0x80022001
sd a1,0(a0)
li a0,0x80022000
li a1,0x8003000F
sd a1,8(a0)
li a0,0x80024000
li a1,0x80025001
sd a1,0(a0)
li a0,0x80025000
li a1,0x80026001
sd a1,0(a0)
li a0,0x80026000
li a1,0x8003100F
sd a1,8(a0)
li a0,0x80030000
li a1,0x12345678
sw a1,0(a0)
li a0,0x80031000
li a1,0xdeadbeef
sw a1,0(a0)
li a0,0x80000000080020
csrw satp,a0
call machine_to_supervisor
li a2,0x1000
ld a0,0(a2)
mv a1,a0
li a0,0x80000000080024
csrw satp,a0
ld a0,0(a2)
# Result: a0 = 0x12345678

# 1233 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x8000000000012345
csrw satp, a1
sfence.vma x0, x0
csrr a0, satp
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000012345

# 1234 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80120000000ABCDE
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
# Result: a1 = 0x80120000000ABCDE

# 1235 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, t0
csrr a0, satp
sfence.vma
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000000

# 1236 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xF000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
# Result: mcause = 2

# 1237 # Extension Must Be Active: S
li t0, (8 << 60) # MODE = Sv39 (virtual memory enabled)
csrw satp, t0
sfence.vma
# speculative address‑translation accesses should not raise exceptions
and a0, a0, a0
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1238 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
csrr a0, satp
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000000

# 1239 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li t1, (8 << 60)
csrw satp, t1
csrr t2, satp
srai t3, t2, 60
andi t3, t3, 0xf
or a0, t3, zero
# Result: a0 = 8

# 1240 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x9234000000000000
csrw satp, t0
csrr t1, satp
srli t1, t1, 44
andi t1, t1, 0xffff
mv a0, t1
# Result: a0 = 0x1234

# 1241 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000 # MODE = 8 (Sv39) shifted to bits 63..60
li a1, 0x123 # Desired ASID
slli a1, a1, 44 # Position ASID in bits 59..44
li a2, 0x2000 # PPN for root page table
or a0, a0, a1 # Combine MODE and ASID
or a0, a0, a2 # Add PPN -> final satp value 0x8001230000002000
csrw satp, a0 # Write satp with new ASID before SFENCE
sfence.vma x0, x0 # Global TLB flush after satp update
csrr a1, satp # Read back satp to verify
# Result: a1 = 0x8001230000002000

# 1242 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8001000000000000
csrw satp, a0
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
li a1, 0x1
sfence.vma x0, a1
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1243 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li t0, 0x8000000000000000 | (1 << 44) | 0x12345
csrw satp, t0
li t1, 0x8000000000000000 | (2 << 44) | 0x12345
csrw satp, t1
sfence.vma x0, x0
li t2, 0x8000000000000000 | (1 << 44) | 0x67890
csrw satp, t2
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1244 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a2, 0x8000000000012345
csrw satp, a2
sfence.vma x0, x0
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1245 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0
li a2, 0
csrw satp, a2
sfence.vma x0, a1
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1246 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li a1, 0x8012300000000000
csrw satp, a1
sfence.vma x0, x0
csrr a0, satp
srli a0, a0, 44
andi a0, a0, 0xffff
# Result: a0 = 0x123

# 1247 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
sfence.vma x0, x0
# Result: mcause = 2

# 1248 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
csrr a0, satp
# Result: a0 = 0x1000000000000000

# 1249 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80000000
li a1, (1 << 60)
or a0, a0, a1
csrw satp, a0
csrr a2, satp
li a1, 0xF000000000000000
and a0, a2, a1
srli a0, a0, 60
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1250 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 0x2

# 1251 # Extension Must Be Active: S
li a0, -1
csrw satp, a0
# Result: mcause = 0x2

# 1252 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80002000 # root page table physical address
li t1, 0x80003000 # data page physical address
li t2, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
sd t2, 0(t1) # store test data at physical page

# create leaf PTE (R/W/X = 1) pointing to data page
srli t3, t1, 12 # t3 = PPN of data page
slli t3, t3, 10
ori t3, t3, 0b111 # set R,W,X bits
sd t3, 0(t0) # store leaf entry at root PT index 0

# construct satp with MODE=Sv32 (1) and root PPN
li t4, 1
slli t4, t4, 60 # MODE in bits 63..60
srli t5, t0, 12 # root PPN
or t4, t4, t5 # satp value
csrw satp, t4
sfence.vma

call machine_to_supervisor

# perform a load through the virtual address that should be translated
li t6, 0x00123000 # virtual address mapped by the leaf entry
ld a1, 0(t6) # load translated data into a1
# Result
# Result: a1 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 1253 # Extension Must Be Active: S
li t0, 0x10000 # root page table base (physical address)
li t1, 0x4401 # root PTE: points to second‑level table (PPN=0x11, V=1)
sw t1, 0(t0) # store root entry at index 0

li t2, 0x11000 # second‑level page table base (physical address)
li t3, 0x803 # leaf PTE: maps VPN=1 to PPN=0x2, V=1, R=1
sw t3, 4(t2) # store leaf entry at index 1 (offset 4)

li t4, 0xdeadbeef # test pattern
li t5, 0x2044 # physical address = (0x2 << 12) + 0x44
sw t4, 0(t5) # place pattern at the physical location

li t6, (1 << 60) | 0x10 # satp: MODE=Sv32 (1), ASID=0, PPN=root=0x10
csrw satp, t6
sfence.vma x0, x0

li t7, 0x1044 # virtual address = (1 << 12) + 0x44
lw a0, 0(t7) # load through translation; should fetch 0xdeadbeef
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeef

# 1254 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x80001000 # a1 = address of root page table
li t0, 0x8000000000080001 # satp = MODE=Sv39 (8) <<60 | PPN=0x80001
csrw satp, t0
sfence.vma x0, x0

# Set up a leaf PTE in the root page table that maps a 1 GiB region to physical 0x00900000
li t1, 0x24000F # PTE: PPN=0x900, V=R=W=X=1
sd t1, 0(a1) # store PTE at root page table entry 0

# Configure PMP to deny all accesses to the physical page 0x00900000‑0x00900FFF
csrw pmpaddr0, x0 # lower bound = 0
li t2, 0x240000 # (0x00900000 >> 2)
csrw pmpaddr1, t2 # upper bound = 0x00900000
li t3, 0x08 # TOR (A=01), no R/W/X permissions, L=0
csrw pmpcfg0, t3

call machine_to_supervisor # switch to S‑mode
lw a0, 0(x0) # supervisor load that hits PMP‑protected region
# Result: mcause = 0x5

# 1255 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li a0, 0x10000FFFFFFFFFF
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
and a2, a1, a0
# Result: a2 = 0x10000FFFFFFFFFF

# 1256 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xABCD00000000deadbeef
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
li t0, 0xF000000000000000
and a2, a1, t0
# Result: a2 = 0

# 1257 # Extension Must Be Active: Sv32
li a0,0x1000000000012345
csrw satp,a0
csrr a1,satp
# Result: a1 = 0x1000000000012345

# 1258 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345
andi a1, a0, 0x7FF
# Result: a1 != 0

# 1259 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x2000
li t0, 8
slli t0, t0, 60
or t0, t0, a0
csrw satp, t0
slli a0, a0, 12
csrr t1, satp
li t2, 0xFFFFFFFFFFF
and t1, t1, t2
slli t1, t1, 12
xor a0, a0, t1
seqz a0, a0
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1260 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0,0x80000000 # root page‑table physical base
li a1,0x2400000F # leaf PTE (PPN=0x90000, flags V,R,W,X)
sd a1,8(a0) # store leaf entry at index 1 (offset 8)

li a1,0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
sd a1,0x90000000 # store data at physical page 0x90000000

# set satp to Sv39 mode, ASID=0, PPN=0x80000 (root PT at 0x80000000)
li a0,0x8000000000080000
csrw satp, a0
sfence.vma

call machine_to_supervisor

# now in S‑mode, perform translation test
li a0,0x40000000 # virtual address that maps to 0x90000000
ld a0,0(a0) # load the value through the page‑table walk
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 1261 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0
csrw satp, a0
csrr a1, satp
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
csrr a2, satp
# Result: a2 = 0x8000000000000000

# 1262 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li a0,0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, a0
csrr a0, satp
# Result: a0 != 0

# 1263 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, t0
li t1, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
li t2, 0x80002000
sd t1, 0(t2)
ld a0, 0(t2)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# 1264 # Extension Must Be Active: Sv39
li t0, 0x8000000000001000
csrw satp, t0
sfence.vma
csrr a0, satp
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000001000

# 1265 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1,0x80002000
li a2,0
sw a2,0(a1) # initialize page to zero
li a0,0
li a2,42
beqz a0,taken
sw a2,0(a1) # speculative store (should be squashed)
j after
taken:
nop
after:
lw a2,0(a1)
# Result: a2 = 0

# 1266 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x8000000000000000
csrw satp, t0
sfence.vma
li a0, 0
li t2, 0xfffffffffff00000
beq a0, zero, after_load
lw a1, 0(t2)
nop
after_load:
li a2, 1
# Result: a2 = 1 & mcause = 0

# 1267 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80002000 # virtual address to be speculatively accessed
li t1, 0 # branch condition (false)
beq t1, zero, spec_load # branch predicted taken, enters speculation
nop # fall‑through (not taken)
spec_load:
lw a0, 0(t0) # speculatively load from mapped page (should succeed)
# Revoke the mapping in the page table (pt_base points to page‑table entry for 0x80002000)
li t2, 0
sd t2, 0(pt_base) # clear PTE
sfence.vma zero, zero # global TLB flush after speculation began
lw a1, 0(t0) # attempt load after revocation (should fault)
# Result captured in mcause by the trap handler
# Result: mcause = 13

# 1268 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, (8 << 60) | 0x1000
csrw satp, t0
sfence.vma
li a1, 0x80000000
lw a2, 0(a1)
csrr a0, mcause
# Result: a0 = 0xd

# 1269 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrr a0, satp
li a2, 0xF000000000000000

# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000000

# Result: a1 = 0x801234deadbeef123

# Result: a2 = 0x12345

# 1272 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t2, 0x2000000
li t3, 0x2001000
li t4, 0x80002
slli t4, t4, 10
ori t4, t4, 0xF
sd t4, 0(t3)

slli t5, t5, 10
ori t5, t5, 0x1
sd t5, 16(t2)
call machine_to_supervisor

# Result: a0 = 1

# 1514 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

csrr a1, sstatus # read back sstatus

and a2, a1, a2 # isolate upper 32 bits, should be zero
# Result: a2 = 0

# 1518 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrs sip, 0x2 # Set pending supervisor software interrupt (SSIP)
call machine_to_user # Enter user mode
nop # This instruction should be interrupted
# Result: a0 = 0x8000000000000001

# 1547 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 0 # clear a1
li a1, 1 # first execution (UBE=0)

li a1, 0 # clear a1 before second test

ori a2, a2, 0x40 # set UBE (bit 6)
csrw sstatus, a2

li a1, 1 # second execution (UBE=1)

# Result: a1 = 0x1

# 1575 # Extension Must Be Active: H
call machine_to_supervisor
csrrs zero, sie, 0x2 # Enable software interrupt (bit 1 in sie)
csrrs zero, sstatus, 0x2 # Set SIE bit in sstatus
wfi # Wait for interrupt; if SIE=1, trap to HS-mode
csrr a0, mcause # Read cause of trap (if taken)
# Result: a0 != 0

and a1, a1, a2
srli a1, a1, 9
and a0, a0, a1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1578 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrw hideleg, t0 # delegate interrupt i in hideleg
csrs sstatus, t0 # set SIE in sstatus
csrs sie, t0 # enable supervisor software interrupt
csrs sip, t0 # set the software interrupt pending bit
wfi # wait for interrupt (should be delegated, not taken in HS-mode)

call machine_to_supervisor
li a0, 0x100
csrw sstatus, a0
li a1, 0x80
csrw hstatus, a1
li a2, 0x80001000
csrw sepc, a2
sret
csrr a0, sepc
# Result: a0 = 0x80001000

# 1596 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li a1, 0x100
csrs sstatus, a1
sret
csrr a0, sstatus
andi a0, a0, 0x100
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1597 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 0x120

csrr a0, sstatus
srli a0, a0, 1
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1598 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrr a0, sstatus
srli a0, a0, 5
andi a0, a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# 1599 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0x20

# 1600 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 != 0x0

# 1601 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0

# 1602 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1603 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li a0, 0x12345678abcdef00 # set a known value for the S‑PELP field
csrw sstatus, a0 # write it into sstatus (assume S‑PELP occupies these bits)
li a1, (1 << 20) # assume LPE is bit 20; set LPE=1 for the upcoming mode
csrs sstatus, a1 # set LPE in sstatus
sret # return from trap; ELP should be restored from S‑PELP
csrr a2, sstatus # read back sstatus to capture the restored field
# Result: a2 = 0x12345678abcdef00

# 1604 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
sret
li a0,0
# Result: a0 = 0x0

# 1605 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrr a0, sstatus
# Result: a0 = 0

# 1606 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

csrrsi x0, sstatus, 1
csrr a0, sstatus
andi a0, a0, 1
mv a1, x7
li x5,0x80001000
jr x5
# Result: a0 = 0x1 & a1 = 0x1234

# 1607 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrs sstatus, 0x22 # Enable SIE (bit1) and set SPIE (bit5) as LPE=1 condition
csrr a0, sstatus # Read sstatus into a0
li t0, 0x20 # Mask for SPIE (S‑PELP bit)
and a0, a0, t0 # Isolate S‑PELP bit and store in a0
csrs sstatus, 0x2 # Re‑enable interrupts (set SIE)
# Result: a0 != 0

# 1608 # Extension Must Be Active: Ssdbltrp

csrr a0, sstatus
# Result: a0 != 0

# 1632 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0x1

# 1633 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
call machine_to_supervisor
li a1, 0x80002000 # BASE (must be 4‑byte aligned)
csrw stvec, a1 # set stvec to Direct mode (MODE=0) with BASE=0x80002000

li a0, 0xdeadbeef # code at BASE sets a0
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeef

# 1634 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t1, 0x80004000
li t2, 0x80004001

li t4, 0x07F00513

li t4, 0x141022F3
sw t4, 0(t3)

li t4, 0x004A0293
sw t4, 0(t3)

li t4, 0x141A1073
sw t4, 0(t3)

li t4, 0x10200073
sw t4, 0(t3)

# Result: a0 = 0x7f

# 1635 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80002001 # stvec = BASE 0x80002000, MODE = vectored

li t1, (1 << 1) # set SSIP (supervisor software interrupt) pending
csrs mip, t1
csrr t2, mstatus
ori t2, t2, (1 << 3) | (1 << 1) # enable MIE and SIE
csrw mstatus, t2
wfi
auipc a0, 0 # handler entry: capture PC
# Result: a0 = 0x80002004

# 1636 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
csrw 0x105, 0x80001001 # stvec = BASE(0x80001000) | MODE=1 (vectored)
csrs sstatus, 0x2 # set SIE (Supervisor Interrupt Enable)
csrw sip, 0x20 # set supervisor timer interrupt pending (cause 5)
wfi # wait for interrupt; PC should jump to BASE+0x14
auipc a0, 0 # a0 = current PC (should be BASE+0x14)
# Result: a0 = 0x80001014
